headline: Adobe WPP AI Alliance Highlights Marketing Potential And Valuation Opportunity
summary: Adobe (NasdaqGS:ADBE) expanded its partnership with WPP to deliver integrated AI driven marketing solutions. The collaboration combines Adobe's generative AI and content platforms with WPP's marketing expertise and agentic marketing platform. The partnership targets large global brands that want AI driven content, data orchestration and privacy aware marketing at scale. For Adobe, which already sits at the intersection of creative software, customer experience tools and data, this expanded...
